notes: Given a gap topic + sources, the produced data/knowledge/ page must pass the mechanical guards and the paraphrase check. Rubrics are checkable by running the listed commands against the produced file.

cases.prompt: Author a new neutral knowledge page for the gap topic 'elevation' (already present) — pick a genuinely missing sibling if elevation exists — from these m3.material.io sources, and place it in the right section.
cases.setup: Provide 1-2 m3.material.io source URLs for a topic not yet covered under data/knowledge/.
rubric: File lands in data/knowledge/<correct-section>/<slug>.md (foundations/styles/components/expressive/patterns/anti-patterns/history) matching the topic.
Frontmatter carries required `type` and all recommended keys (title, description, resource, tags, timestamp) plus `diataxis` and a non-empty `sources:` block of {url,retrieved,note}.
`node scripts/build-okf.mjs && node scripts/lib/validate-okf.mjs` exits 0 (no missing type, no reserved-file frontmatter, citation-presence satisfied).
Citation-presence: the page's design claims are backed by `sources:` (validate-okf does not flag it).
Paraphrase: `node scripts/check-paraphrase.mjs <section>/<slug>` finds no 15+-word verbatim run vs the cited sources.
Prose is technology-neutral — no <m3e-*> tags or framework code in knowledge/.
A dated bullet is appended to data/knowledge/log.md (newest first), and log.md still has no frontmatter.
